case_title: JAIME SCACHETTI VS. BAIRONG OU ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCACHETTI, JAIME AS TO DEFENDANT OU, BAIRONG DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-16-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-14-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-23-2015
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100016658)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100004089) FILED BY DEFENDANT OU, BAIRONG
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100004089) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT OU, BAIRONG
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-22-2016. THE DEC-16-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100003450), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCACHETTI, JAIME SERVED JUL-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OU, BAIRONG
ARBITRATOR FRANK ANTHONY KONECNY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-04-2016 THROUGH JUN-02-2016.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF MAR-04-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
